workflows.name: Assign Work Order to Technician
workflows.description: Routes a new work order to the nearest available technician.

workflows.name: Escalate Overdue Work Order
workflows.description: Notifies the dispatcher when a work order passes its SLA.

workflows.name: Generate Invoice on Completion
workflows.description: Creates an invoice when a work order is marked complete.

workflows.name: Notify Technician of Visit
workflows.description: Sends the technician an itinerary for the day's visits.

workflows.name: Sync Asset to Field Service
workflows.description: Keeps customer assets in step with installed equipment.

workflows.name: Send Agreement Renewal Reminder
workflows.description: Cloud flow emailing customers before an agreement lapses.

workflows.name: Quote Follow-up Reminder
workflows.description: Cloud flow nudging the sales rep on stale open quotes.
